User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the LocalSphere system, including staff (admin, staff) and potentially clients accessing their portal.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for login and communication.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the system (e.g., 'admin', 'staff', 'client'), determining access levels.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Client.title: Client
Client.description: Represents a client organization or primary contact that LocalSphere provides services to.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Client entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User entity if the client has a login to the LocalSphere platform. (Relationship: User 1:N Client)

companyName.description: The name of the client's organization or business.

contactFirstName.description: The first name of the primary contact person for the client.

contactLastName.description: The last name of the primary contact person for the client.

contactEmail.description: The email address of the primary contact person.

contactPhone.description: The phone number of the primary contact person.

address.description: The main street address of the client or contact person.

city.description: The city of the client's location.

state.description: The state or region of the client's location.

zipCode.description: The postal code of the client's location.

country.description: The country of the client's location.

onboardingDate.description: The date when the client was onboarded to LocalSphere's services.

status.description: The current status of the client relationship (e.g., 'active', 'onboarding', 'inactive').

notes.description: General notes or remarks about the client.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the client record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the client record was last updated.

BusinessProfile.title: BusinessProfile
BusinessProfile.description: Represents a local business for which LocalSphere provides digital services, detailing its public-facing information and location.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BusinessProfile entity.

clientId.description: Reference to the Client entity who owns or manages this business. (Relationship: Client 1:N BusinessProfile)

name.description: The official name of the business (e.g., 'Mama's Ethiopian Restaurant').

primaryCategory.description: The main category describing the business (e.g., 'Restaurant', 'Hair Salon', 'Medical Clinic').

description.description: A brief description or 'about us' for the business.

address.description: The physical street address of the business.

city.description: The city where the business is located.

state.description: The state or region where the business is located.

zipCode.description: The postal code of the business location.

country.description: The country where the business is located.

phone.description: The primary contact phone number for the business.

websiteUrl.description: The URL of the business's official website.

googleBusinessProfileUrl.description: The URL of the business's Google Business Profile.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude of the business location for map integration.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude of the business location for map integration.

status.description: The operational status of the business profile (e.g., 'active', 'paused', 'needs attention').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the business profile record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the business profile record was last updated.

ServiceOffering.title: ServiceOffering
ServiceOffering.description: Defines the types of digital services that LocalSphere offers to its clients.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ServiceOffering entity.

name.description: The name of the service (e.g., 'Google Business Profile Optimization', 'Basic Website Development').

description.description: A detailed description of what the service includes.

category.description: The category of the service (e.g., 'SEO', 'Website', 'Content Marketing', 'Reputation Management').

oneTimeSetupFee.description: The standard one-time setup fee for this service, if applicable.

monthlySubscriptionFee.description: The standard monthly subscription fee for this service, if applicable.

isActive.description: Indicates if the service offering is currently available for purchase.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the service offering was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the service offering was last updated.

ClientService.title: ClientService
ClientService.description: Represents an active or historical instance of a ServiceOffering provided to a specific BusinessProfile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ClientService entity.

businessProfileId.description: Reference to the BusinessProfile entity receiving this service. (Relationship: BusinessProfile 1:N ClientService)

serviceOfferingId.description: Reference to the ServiceOffering entity that defines this service. (Relationship: ServiceOffering 1:N ClientService)

startDate.description: The date when the service officially started for the client.

endDate.description: The projected or actual date when a subscription-based service is scheduled to end.

actualSetupFee.description: The actual one-time setup fee charged for this specific service instance.

actualMonthlyFee.description: The actual monthly fee charged for this specific service instance, if applicable.

status.description: The current status of this service instance (e.g., 'active', 'in progress', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'paused').

notes.description: Specific notes, updates, or progress reports for this client service.

assignedStaffId.description: Reference to the User entity (staff member) assigned to manage or deliver this service. (Relationship: User 1:N ClientService)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the client service record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the client service record was last updated.

BusinessReview.title: BusinessReview
BusinessReview.description: Stores information about reviews received by a BusinessProfile from various platforms.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BusinessReview entity.

businessProfileId.description: Reference to the BusinessProfile this review belongs to. (Relationship: BusinessProfile 1:N BusinessReview)

platform.description: The platform where the review was originally posted (e.g., 'Google', 'Facebook', 'Yelp').

reviewerName.description: The name or username of the person who posted the review.

rating.description: The numerical rating given in the review (e.g., 1-5 stars).

comment.description: The text content of the review comment.

reviewDate.description: The date and time when the review was posted.

response.description: The response provided by the business or LocalSphere to the review.

sentiment.description: The determined sentiment of the review (e.g., 'positive', 'negative', 'neutral').

isResponded.description: Indicates whether a response has been made to this review.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the review record was created in the system (e.g., when it was fetched).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the review record was last updated.

SEOMetric.title: SEOMetric
SEOMetric.description: Records various SEO and online presence performance metrics for a BusinessProfile over time.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SEOMetric entity.

businessProfileId.description: Reference to the BusinessProfile this metric is associated with. (Relationship: BusinessProfile 1:N SEOMetric)

metricType.description: The type of metric being recorded (e.g., 'Google Search Views', 'Google Map Views', 'Website Clicks', 'Direction Requests', 'Call Clicks', 'Keyword Ranking').

value.description: The numerical value of the metric at the recorded date.

dateRecorded.description: The specific date or date-time when this metric value was recorded.

source.description: The source from which the metric data was obtained (e.g., 'Google Business Profile Insights', 'Google Analytics', 'Third-Party SEO Tool').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the metric record was created in the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the metric record was last updated.

Inquiry.title: Inquiry
Inquiry.description: Represents a contact or service inquiry submitted via the public contact form.

name.description: Full name of the person inquiring.

email.description: Email address of the person inquiring.

businessName.description: Name of the business the inquiry is about.

service.description: The service they are interested in.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the inquiry was submitted.

definition.description: Stores user profiles and their roles within the LocalSphere system (admin, staff, client).
A global catalog of digital services offered by LocalSphere.
Details for a specific local business.
Public inquiries submitted through the contact form. Write-only for public, read/manage for staff.
